headline: Jacobs Secures Contracts to Improve Travel on Chicago’s I-290 Corridor
summary: DALLAS, April 09, 2026--Jacobs to Improve Travel on Chicago’s I-290 Corridor. Essential upgrades will strengthen resilience and enhance safety on vital US multimodal network
